missing_ramp.title: Ramps
missing_ramp.description: Ramps along accessible routes must have a running slope no steeper than 1:12 and a minimum clear width of 36 inches.
missing_ramp.requirement: An accessible route with a ramp must be provided where there is a change in level greater than 1/2 inch.

missing_handrail.title: Handrails on Ramps
missing_handrail.description: Ramps with a rise greater than 6 inches must have handrails on both sides.
missing_handrail.requirement: Handrails must be 34-38 inches above the ramp surface and extend 12 inches beyond the top and bottom.

narrow_doorway.title: Door Clear Width
narrow_doorway.description: Doorways must provide a minimum clear opening width of 32 inches.
narrow_doorway.requirement: Measured between the face of the door and the opposite stop when the door is open 90 degrees.

round_door_knob.title: Door Hardware
round_door_knob.description: Door hardware must be operable with one hand without tight grasping, pinching, or twisting of the wrist.
round_door_knob.requirement: Lever handles, push-type, or U-shaped handles are compliant. Round knobs are not.

missing_accessible_parking_sign.title: Accessible Parking Signage
missing_accessible_parking_sign.description: Accessible parking spaces must be identified by signs with the International Symbol of Accessibility.
missing_accessible_parking_sign.requirement: Signs must be 60 inches minimum above the ground, measured to the bottom of the sign.

missing_parking_striping.title: Accessible Parking Access Aisle
missing_parking_striping.description: Access aisles must be marked to discourage parking in them and must be level.
missing_parking_striping.requirement: Access aisles must be 60 inches wide minimum (96 inches for van-accessible).

missing_curb_cut.title: Curb Ramps
missing_curb_cut.description: Curb ramps must be provided wherever an accessible route crosses a curb.
missing_curb_cut.requirement: Curb ramps must have a maximum slope of 1:12 and detectable warning surfaces.

missing_tactile_signage.title: Raised Characters and Braille Signs
missing_tactile_signage.description: Signs identifying rooms and spaces must include raised characters and Grade 2 Braille.
missing_tactile_signage.requirement: Mounted 48-60 inches above floor on the latch side of the door.

missing_grab_bars.title: Grab Bars in Toilet Rooms
missing_grab_bars.description: Grab bars must be provided on the side wall and rear wall closest to the toilet.
missing_grab_bars.requirement: Side grab bar: 42 inches minimum. Rear grab bar: 36 inches minimum. Mounted 33-36 inches above floor.

blocked_accessible_route.title: Accessible Routes
blocked_accessible_route.description: Accessible routes must be continuous, unobstructed paths connecting all accessible elements.
blocked_accessible_route.requirement: Minimum clear width of 36 inches (44 inches in corridors with frequent use).

no_accessible_entrance.title: Accessible Entrances
no_accessible_entrance.description: At least 60% of all public entrances must be accessible.
no_accessible_entrance.requirement: Accessible entrances must be connected to accessible routes and identified with the ISA if not all entrances are accessible.

step_only_entrance.title: Thresholds at Doorways
step_only_entrance.description: Thresholds at doorways must not exceed 1/2 inch in height (3/4 inch for sliding doors).
step_only_entrance.requirement: Changes in level greater than 1/2 inch require a ramp or other accessible means.

protruding_objects.title: Protruding Objects
protruding_objects.description: Objects on walls or posts must not protrude more than 4 inches into circulation paths if mounted between 27 and 80 inches above the floor.
protruding_objects.requirement: Objects below 27 inches can protrude any amount. Objects above 80 inches are not restricted.

inaccessible_counter.title: Sales and Service Counters
inaccessible_counter.description: A portion of the counter must be 36 inches maximum above the floor and 36 inches minimum in length.
inaccessible_counter.requirement: Alternatively, an auxiliary counter or equivalent facilitation must be provided.

missing_directional_signage.title: Directional and Informational Signs
missing_directional_signage.description: Signs providing directions to accessible features must include the International Symbol of Accessibility.
missing_directional_signage.requirement: Must be placed at decision points along accessible routes.

steep_ramp.title: Ramp Slope
steep_ramp.description: Ramp running slope must not exceed 1:12 (8.33%).
steep_ramp.requirement: Cross slope must not exceed 1:48. Rise for any ramp run must be 30 inches maximum.

missing_detectable_warnings.title: Detectable Warning Surfaces
missing_detectable_warnings.description: Truncated dome surfaces must be provided at curb ramps, transit platform edges, and other hazardous vehicular areas.
missing_detectable_warnings.requirement: Domes must contrast visually with adjacent surfaces (light-on-dark or dark-on-light).

inaccessible_restroom.title: Toilet and Bathing Rooms
inaccessible_restroom.description: At least one of each type of toilet room must be accessible and on an accessible route.
inaccessible_restroom.requirement: Must include accessible turning space (60-inch diameter), accessible fixtures, and proper signage.
